final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic illustrating the definitions of and relationships among 7 AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include all 7 concepts as labeled nodes with visual definitions and connecting relationship lines/arrows between them, laid out for clarity and readability
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with brief definitions and relationship annotations:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable infographic background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable and easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a clear, readable direction with visual hierarchy — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketch texture feel — exact line weight and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names verbatim; must show relationship connections between concepts visually; must be legible and diagram-style
Avoid:
